title: Dynamic Tax Calculation Based on Job or Delivery Location

posts.author: ashtondavanzo (ashton@adrenalinattractions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add automatic tax calculation based on install or delivery location, similar to QuickBooks. This would reduce manual tax overrides and improve accuracy for location-based projects.

What are you trying to achieve

Automatically calculate accurate sales tax based on where a project is installed or delivered.

posts.author: Leona221Ng (Leona221Ng)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Add automatic tax calculation based on the project’s install or delivery location, so sales tax is applied accurately without manual overrides. This ensures location‑based projects are billed correctly, improves efficiency, and reduces errors compared to manual tax handling.

posts.author: bettyparker098 (betty parker)
posts.cookedHtml: Great ! It’s great to see such a clear focus drive real improvements and strategy.
